reviews.review_description: I had the (free) demo of this game on my wishlist for probably a year but never downloaded it. I couldn't even remember anything about the title but it popped up on sale so I bought it. Now I'm totally addicted and drag an office chair into my living room each night to play. The mechanic is very simple to understand but extremely challenging to master. There's a similar (but VERY basic) mini-game inside the TRIPP meditation app that promotes "focus" and this title absolutely requires Zen-like presence for any level of success. I'm so glad I finally bought this game but it's driving me batty attempting to "get gud." I can't say if others will find it as addictive and totally immersive as I, but the game absolutely delivers on what it attempts, i.e. continuously enticing you to try "just one more round" before rage-quitting due to your own failure. I also want to thank the devs for including a colour-blind mode. Like 8% of men, I'm red/green colour-blind and would be unable to play this otherwise--they've done an exceptional job on this feature. It's a GREAT game for what it is. Don't be a dummy (like me) - - try the free demo and buy the full game if you like it. If I had it to do over, I would have purchased this at full price a year ago because this game is soooo addictive and enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Wow! Thank you for a very long and honest review! We are glad you enjoy playing the game and that the 'colorblind' mode helps you! Keep it up!

reviews.review_description: I loved this game playing on my phone and now in 3D can’t get enough of it, this is an awesome game, would recommend for any age.
Great graphics.  Lots of fun with some challenge.  Coming from a year of playing Zooma, I'm still getting used to the aiming but a must-have for marble shooter fans!

It's an interesting take on an old classic. The gameplay is smooth and actually adds a few interesting twists to the gameplay formula. If I were to fault it, I would say it's a little too short, but you can extend the play time in survival mode.

Great Game, but please add a colorblind option.

Edit: Wow! Thanks for the Update! That was fast! :) The new designs helps alot!

developer_response.body: We are glad that it helps!

reviews.review_description: Such a fun arcade game! This is one of those mobile games that I never played but am really enjoying the vr version!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are glad you enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description: Very good game    mechanics perfect.   very addictive. Graphics are top notch.   Like the whole concept of this.  Great work by the devs to create a first class game and such a great price. Treat yourself. well worth it!!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We are glad that you enjoy the experience.

reviews.review_description: I'm 65 yrs young and loving this game. Easy to play while keeping my reflexes sharp.

developer_response.body: Thank you and we are glad that the game keeps your reflexes sharp! Keep it up!
